languages.text:
Дальнейший путь стерся из моей памяти — и, возможно, памяти каждого, кто проделал эту кошмарную одиссею в сердце некронского мира. Когда отряд наконец достиг преддверия Музеона, его вид потряс меня едва ли не больше, чем все пережитое ранее.
Титаническая конструкция возвышалась в центре огромного зала.

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] Стремная хрень из переплетенных психомансеров с ядром

languages.text:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the command centre, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
The monstrous structure floated in the centre of the spherical chamber, slowly rotating on its axis.

The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

languages.text:
之后的旅程，已从我的记忆中彻底抹除。或许，所有经历了太空死灵世界核心远征之旅的人，也都摒弃了那段噩梦般的记忆。小队终于抵达陈列馆的前厅，眼前景象带来的震撼，几乎超过了我此前经历的一切。
一座庞然巨构矗立在大厅中央。
languages.original_text:

When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.

traits.locale_text:
之后的旅程，已从我的记忆中彻底抹除。或许，所有经历了太空死灵世界核心远征之旅的人，也都摒弃了那段噩梦般的记忆。小队终于抵达陈列馆的前厅，眼前景象带来的震撼，几乎超过了我此前经历的一切。
一座庞然巨构矗立在大厅中央。

languages.text:
El resto del viaje ha abandonado mis memorias, así como las de todos los que se embarcaron en esa odisea infernal hacia el corazón del mundo Necrón. Nada pudo haberme preparado para lo que vi al llegar a la antecámara del Museion. Nunca había visto nada parecido.
Una estructura colosal se erguía en el centro de un inmenso salón.
languages.original_text:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

traits.locale_text:
El resto del viaje ha abandonado mis memorias, así como las de todos los que se embarcaron en esa odisea infernal hacia el corazón del mundo Necrón. Nada pudo haberme preparado para lo que vi al llegar a la antecámara del Museion. Nunca había visto nada parecido.
Una estructura colosal se erguía en el centro de un inmenso salón.

languages.text:
Je n'ai gardé aucun souvenir du reste du trajet, comme sans doute la plupart des autres participants à cette odyssée infernale au cœur du monde des Nécrons. Lorsque l'escouade finit par atteindre l'antichambre du Muséion, sa seule vision provoqua en moi un choc plus puissant que tout ce que j'avais pu connaître par le passé.
Une gigantesque structure trônait au milieu d'un hall tout aussi disproportionné.
languages.original_text:

When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

Lorsque l'escouade finit par atteindre l'antichambre du Muséion, sa seule vision provoqua en moi un choc plus puissant que tout ce que j'avais pu connaître par le passé.
Une gigantesque structure trônait au milieu d'un hall tout aussi disproportionné.

languages.text: Yolculuğun geri kalanı hafızamdan silindi. Muhtemelen o kâbus gibi yolculuğu Nekron dünyasının kalbine yapan herkesin hafızasından da. Manga sonunda Museion'un ön salonuna ulaştığında gördüğüm manzara, beni daha önce deneyimlediğim neredeyse her şeyden daha fazla şok etti. Büyük salonun ortasında devasa bir yapı yükseliyordu.
languages.original_text:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

traits.locale_text: Yolculuğun geri kalanı hafızamdan silindi. Muhtemelen o kâbus gibi yolculuğu Nekron dünyasının kalbine yapan herkesin hafızasından da. Manga sonunda Museion'un ön salonuna ulaştığında gördüğüm manzara, beni daha önce deneyimlediğim neredeyse her şeyden daha fazla şok etti. Büyük salonun ortasında devasa bir yapı yükseliyordu.

languages.text:
An den Rest der Reise habe ich keinerlei Erinnerung ... genau wie alle anderen Beteiligten dieser albtraumhaften Odyssee in die Welt der Necrons. Als der Trupp endlich die Vorkammer des Museions erreichte, schockierte mich deren Anblick mehr als alles, was ich bis dato erlebt hatte.
In der Mitte einer riesigen Halle stand eine gigantische Struktur.
languages.original_text:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the Museion's antechamber, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
A gargantuan structure towered in the middle of a vast hall.

traits.locale_text:
An den Rest der Reise habe ich keinerlei Erinnerung ... genau wie alle anderen Beteiligten dieser albtraumhaften Odyssee in die Welt der Necrons. Als der Trupp endlich die Vorkammer des Museions erreichte, schockierte mich deren Anblick mehr als alles, was ich bis dato erlebt hatte.
In der Mitte einer riesigen Halle stand eine gigantische Struktur.

languages.text:
その旅の残りは、私の記憶から消え、恐らく、その悪夢のような旅をネクロンの世界の中心部まで行った者たちの記憶からも消えている。部隊がようやく指揮所に到着した時、その光景は、私が今まで経験した何よりも衝撃的なものだった。
その巨大な建造物は、球形の部屋の中央に浮かび、ゆっくりと自転していた。
languages.original_text:
The rest of the journey has been expunged from my memory — and likely from the memories of all who made that nightmarish odyssey into the heart of the Necron world. When the squad finally reached the command centre, the sight of it shocked me almost more than anything I had ever experienced before.
The monstrous structure floated in the centre of the spherical chamber, slowly rotating on its axis.

traits.locale_text:

その巨大な建造物は、球形の部屋の中央に浮かび、ゆっくりと自転していた。
